finding_results.notes: The ambush roster now reads as six gray-liveried enforcement agents plus one separate field tracker. Vel now opens on immediate movement and trail consequence rather than a rhetorical setup. Her rebuke keeps the 3-versus-41 arithmetic in field language tied to the wrecked clearing and the next pursuit wave, and the later calibration line has been roughened away from the style-bible example scaffold.
